title: SHAMS: Tokamak 0-D Design Studio (feasibility-authoritative evaluator)
description: SHAMS is a feasibility-authoritative tokamak 0-D design studio with a frozen deterministic evaluator (L0), explicit hard/diagnostic/ignored constraints, NO-SOLUTION as a valid scientific outcome, and certified external optimization (propose-only, CCFS). It is not a drop-in numeric clone of UKAEA PROCESS; plant and magnet models may be proxies unless declared as versioned authority overlays. PROCESS numeric parity is METHOD-ONLY until lab-supplied reference files land; SHAMS does not claim PROCESS retirement. Cite the release VERSION plus artifact SHA-256 hashes for feasibility studies; see docs/LIMITATIONS.md for the honest scope shipped with every scientific handoff.
notes: Release verdict at this version: CONDITIONAL (docs/validation/reports/scientific_release_readiness_20260716.md). The APPROVED-release path and archival procedure are documented in docs/RELEASE_ARCHIVAL_CHECKLIST.md. No DOI is minted until a tagged Zenodo deposit is performed per that checklist.
